member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Data.DatabaseSeeder
member.summary: Seeds the application database with initial data.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Data.DatabaseSeeder.SeedAsync(MovieApp.Core.Data.MovieAppDbContext)
member.summary: Seeds the database if it is empty.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Data.MovieAppDbContext
member.summary: Entity Framework Core database context for MovieApp.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Data.MovieAppDbContext.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions{MovieApp.Core.Data.MovieAppDbContext})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Data.MovieAppDbContextFactory
member.summary: Design-time factory for Entity Framework tooling.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IBadgeService
member.summary: Exposes badge operations.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IBadgeService.GetUserBadges(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets badges awarded to a user.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IBadgeService.GetAllBadges
member.summary: Gets all badge definitions.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IBadgeService.GetBadgeProgress(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets detailed badge progress for a user.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IBadgeService.CheckAndAwardBadges(System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks and awards all eligible badges for a user.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IBattleService
member.summary: Exposes battle and betting operations.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IBattleService.GetActiveBattle
member.summary: Gets the active battle.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IBattleService.CreateBattle(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a weekly battle.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IBattleService.PlaceBet(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Places a bet on a battle.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IBattleService.GetBet(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a specific bet for a battle.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IBattleService.DetermineWinner(System.Int32)
member.summary: Determines the winner of a battle.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IBattleService.DistributePayouts(System.Int32)
member.summary: Distributes payouts for a completed battle.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.ICatalogService
member.summary: Exposes catalog operations for movies.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.ICatalogService.GetAllMovies
member.summary: Gets all movies in the catalog.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.ICatalogService.GetMovieById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a movie by its identifier.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.ICatalogService.SearchMovies(System.String)
member.summary: Searches movies by title.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.ICatalogService.FilterMovies(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Filters movies by genre and minimum rating.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.ICommentService
member.summary: Exposes forum comment operations.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.ICommentService.GetCommentsForMovie(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets all comments for a movie.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.ICommentService.AddComment(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a root comment.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.ICommentService.AddReply(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a reply to an existing comment.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.ICommentService.DeleteComment(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a comment.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IPointService
member.summary: Exposes gamification point operations.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IPointService.GetUserStats(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the stats for a user.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IPointService.AddPoints(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds points for a review-related action.
member.param: Whether the movie is in the active battle.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IPointService.DeductPoints(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Deducts points from a user.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IPointService.FreezePoints(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Freezes points for a bet.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IPointService.RefundPoints(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Refunds previously frozen points.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IPointService.UpdateWeeklyScore(System.Int32)
member.summary: Recalculates the weekly score for a user.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IReviewService
member.summary: Exposes review operations.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IReviewService.GetReviewsForMovie(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets all reviews for a movie.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IReviewService.AddReview(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Single,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a review for a movie.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IReviewService.UpdateReview(System.Int32,System.Single,System.String)
member.summary: Updates an existing review.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IReviewService.DeleteReview(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a review.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IReviewService.SubmitExtraReview(System.Int32,System.Single,System.String,System.Single,System.String,System.Single,System.String,System.Single,System.String,System.Single,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Submits extra review details.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Interfaces.IReviewService.GetAverageRating(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the current movie average rating.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Models.Badge
member.summary: Represents an achievement badge.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Models.BadgeProgress
member.summary: Represents a user's progress toward a badge.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Models.Battle
member.summary: Represents a weekly battle between two movies.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Models.Bet
member.summary: Represents a user's bet on a battle.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Models.Comment
member.summary: Represents a comment or reply in the movie discussion forum.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Models.CriticReview
member.summary: Represents a normalized external critic review.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Models.Movie
member.summary: Represents a movie that can be cataloged, reviewed, and battled.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Models.Review
member.summary: Represents a user's review for a movie.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Models.User
member.summary: Represents an application user.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Models.UserBadge
member.summary: Represents the many-to-many association between users and badges.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Models.UserStats
member.summary: Represents gamification statistics for a user.

member.summary: Provides badge operations.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:MovieApp.Core.Services.ExternalReviewService
member.summary: Provides mocked external review data that can later be swapped for real API calls.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Services.ExternalReviewService.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Services.ExternalReviewService.GetExternalReviews(System.String)
member.summary: Gets mocked external critic reviews for a movie.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Services.ExternalReviewService.GetAggregateScores(System.String)
member.summary: Gets mocked aggregate critic and audience scores for a movie.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Services.ExternalReviewService.AnalyseLexicon(System.Collections.Generic.List{MovieApp.Core.Models.CriticReview})
member.summary: Analyzes frequently used non-stop-words from critic review snippets.

member.name: M:MovieApp.Core.Services.ExternalReviewService.IsPolarized(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Determines whether critic and audience scores are polarized.

member.summary: Provides review operations.
